category_sources: Official GitHub README describes zoxide as a smarter cd command that remembers frequently used directories.
source_facts.description: Shell extension to navigate your filesystem faster.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README title is zoxide.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation, with getting started, installation, configuration, and integrations.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has value https://github.com/ajeetdsouza/zoxide; repo returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README says zoxide is inspired by z and autojump, works on major shells, and helps jump to directories.
source_facts.package-manager entries and repository language context support CLI and Rust tags.
